tweets.text: The actual trade here isn't just shorting VeChain. It's going long Bitcoin AND short VeChain at the same time. #VET You're not betting on crypto going down. You're betting on VeChain underperforming Bitcoin, which it has done very consistently for years. That's a much cleaner set
